revision.text:
[[ja:加畑賀茂神社]] {{Expand Japanese|加畑賀茂神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Kabatakamo Shrine | native_name = 加畑賀茂神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kabatakamo Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.647694|138.875306}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Kabatakamo Shrine'''|加畑賀茂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} * (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Ідзу|zh_min_nan|Izu-kok|zh_yue|伊豆國|zh|伊豆國|qid=Q860928|1=Izu Province}} * {{ill|Q961511|ltq=Q961511|qid=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}} == coordinate location (P625) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == postal code (P281) == * 415-0303https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 9080105004533https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Kamono Shrine|lt=Kamono Shrine|qid=Q135039667|1=Kamono Shrine (Q135039667)}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県賀茂郡南伊豆町下賀茂19ｰ1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:加畑賀茂神社]] {{wikidata link|Q128867071}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Kabatakamo Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|qid=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}{{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|qid=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}} Shimokamo 19-1[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401049 静岡県神社庁] |位置 = {{Coord|34|38|51.7|N|138|52|31.1|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|UNKNOWN|lt=Yae Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Kabata
Kamo Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|38|51.7|N|138|52|31.1|E}}|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|38|51.7|N|138|52|31.1|E}}}} }} '''Kabatakamo Shrine''' (かばたかもじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|qid=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|qid=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. It is identified as one of the two seats of '''Kamo Shrine''' (かもじんじゃ), a {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}. Its sacred tree is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=juniper|1=UNKNOWN}} said to be 1,200 years old, located across {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=National Route 136|1=UNKNOWN}}. === History === It is said to have been founded in the {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|qid=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} era (806-810). In the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|qid=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' it is recorded as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Kamo no Myōjin." There is a tradition that Mishima Daimyōjin of {{ill|lt=Iyo Province|Q907829|qid=Q907829|1=Iyo Province}} ({{ill|lt=Ōyamazumi Shrine|Q703904|qid=Q703904|1=Ōyamazumi Shrine}}) landed from the {{ill|lt=Izu Islands|Q864302|qid=Q864302|1=Izu Islands}} to the {{ill|lt=Izu Peninsula|Q822822|qid=Q822822|1=Izu Peninsula}} at this siteShikinaisha Survey Report, Vol. 10 (Tōkaidō 5). Until the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, the enshrined deity was {{ill|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|qid=Q386563|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}}''Zushū Shikō''''Jinja Kakuroku Ge'', but in the Meiji period it was changed to {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} in line with the deity change at {{ill|lt=Mishima Taisha|Q650772|qid=Q650772|1=Mishima Taisha}}. === References === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401049 加畑賀茂神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office {{Pref-stub|pref=静岡県}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kabatakamo Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kabatakamo Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Mishima–Ōyamazumi cult]] [[Category:Buildings in Minamiizu]] [[Category:History of Minamiizu]]
